subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath resounded from the Lote-Tree of Fire upon the Luminous Spot in the Mount of Manifestation, and hath appeared in the Temple of Man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من سدره النار علی بقعه النور فی طور الظهور قد کان علی هیکل الانسان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
